source:
As the number of journals are very minimal.

We hardcoded price and society information.

This needs to be validated before every Jan run.

Explore the option to fetch the data from ACS website

**IMPORTANT** : The jounrl excel needs to be mnaully dowloaded as it doesn't support copy activity

useCols = 'B:O'
skiprow = 3
nrow= 90
sheet_name = 'Journal Vitals'
csv_file_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/ACS/all/all_Journals.csv'
acs_file_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/ACS/import/ACS Publications Summary for Information Professionals.xlsx'
acs_price_file_path ='abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/ACS/price/journal_price.csv'
acs_society_file_path ='abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/ACS/society/journal_society.csv'

df = pd.read_excel(
    acs_file_path,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,
    skiprows=skiprow,
    nrows=nrow            
)

df.to_csv(csv_file_path, index=False)

journal_price_data = [
    {"Coden": "acscii","name": "ACS Central Science", "APC_USD": 0},
    {"Coden": "acsodf","name": "ACS Omega", "APC_USD": 1935},
    {"Coden": "jaaucr","name": "ACS Au Journals", "APC_USD": 3500},
    {"Coden": "other","name": "Other fully open access journals", "APC_USD": 3500},  
    {"Coden": "hybrid","name": "Other hybrid open access journals", "APC_USD": 4500},
    {"Coden": "apwdam","name": "Artificial Photosynthesis", "APC_USD": 0},
    {"Coden": "cbihbp","name": "Chemical & Biomedical Imaging", "APC_USD": 0},
    {"Coden": "ehnea2","name": "Environment & Health", "APC_USD": 0},
    {"Coden": "pstoco","name": "Polymer Science & Technology", "APC_USD": 0},
    {"Coden": "pcrhej","name": "Precision Chemistry", "APC_USD": 0}
] 

# Create a DataFrame
price_df = pd.DataFrame(journal_price_data)
price_df.to_csv(acs_price_file_path, index=False)

journal_society_data = [
    {"Coden": "apwdam","name": "Artifical Photosynthesis", "Society": "The Dailan Institute of Chemical Physics and Westlake University"},
    {"Coden": "cbehb5","name": "Chem & Bio Engineering", "Society": "Zhejiang University"},
    {"Coden": "cbihbp","name": "Chemical & Biomedical Imaging", "Society": "Nanjing University"},
    {"Coden": "ehnea2","name": "Environment & Health", "Society": "Research Center for Eco-Environmental Sciences, Chinese Academy of Sciences"},
    {"Coden": "pcrhej","name": "Precision Chemistry", "Society": "University of Science and Technology of China"}
] 

# Create a DataFrame
society_df = pd.DataFrame(journal_society_data)
society_df.to_csv(acs_society_file_path, index=False)
